category_sources: source_facts.description says "Tool for interacting with RP2040/RP2350 devices and binaries".
source_facts.homepage is the official Raspberry Pi picotool repository.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage uses the repository/project name picotool.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README at source_facts.homepage is the best official documentation surface for picotool.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/raspberrypi/picotool, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names RP2040/RP2350 devices and binaries.
source_facts.executables lists the picotool command-line executable.
